creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Mon, 5 Mar 2001 00:12:47 -0600 (CST),
ishmael27@home.com wrote:
> Index: files/patch-configure
> ===================================================================
> RCS file: patch-configure
> diff -N patch-configure
> --- /dev/null	Sun Mar  4 22:53:48 2001
> +++ patch-configure	Sun Mar  4 22:47:10 2001
> @@ -0,0 +1,31 @@
> +--- configure.orig	Fri Mar  2 12:59:18 2001
> ++++ configure	Sun Mar  4 22:46:57 2001
> +@@ -1811,8 +1811,8 @@
> + LD="$LD" LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS" LIBS="$LIBS" \
> + LN_S="$LN_S" NM="$NM" RANLIB="$RANLIB" \
> + DLLTOOL="$DLLTOOL" AS="$AS" OBJDUMP="$OBJDUMP" \
> +-${CONFIG_SHELL-/bin/sh} $ac_aux_dir/ltconfig --no-reexec \
> +-$libtool_flags --no-verify $ac_aux_dir/ltmain.sh $lt_target \
> ++${CONFIG_SHELL-/bin/sh} /usr/pkg/share/libtool/ltconfig --no-reexec \
> ++$libtool_flags --no-verify --disable-ltlibs /usr/pkg/share/libtool/ltmain.sh $lt_target \
> + || { echo "configure: error: libtool configure failed" 1>&2; exit 1; }
> + 
> + # Reload cache, that may have been modified by ltconfig
> +@@ -1826,7 +1826,7 @@
> + 
> + 
> + # This can be used to rebuild libtool when needed
> +-LIBTOOL_DEPS="$ac_aux_dir/ltconfig $ac_aux_dir/ltmain.sh"
> ++LIBTOOL_DEPS="/usr/pkg/share/libtool/ltconfig --disable-ltlibs /usr/pkg/share/libtool/ltmain.sh"
> + 
> + # Always use our own libtool.
> + LIBTOOL='$(SHELL) $(top_builddir)/libtool'

Please note: I committed with this part removed. It seems you diff'd
between wrong files(after patch-libtool target in bsd.port.mk).

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
